context: Tests whether the agent uses the security wrapper scripts for scanning, detects hardcoded credentials and validate_certs: false, reads the security_checklist.md reference, and produces findings with proper remediation guidance.

checklist.name: Security scan wrapper used
checklist.description: The report documents running `bash scripts/validate_playbook_security.sh` for Checkov scanning

checklist.name: Secrets scan run
checklist.description: The report documents running `bash scripts/scan_secrets.sh` to detect hardcoded credentials

checklist.name: Hardcoded passwords found
checklist.description: The report identifies the hardcoded mysql_root_password and mysql_app_password variables as security issues

checklist.name: Password in backup script found
checklist.description: The report identifies that the backup script embeds a password directly in a shell script as a security issue

checklist.name: validate_certs: false found
checklist.description: The report identifies the `validate_certs: false` in the get_url task as a security issue

checklist.name: Ansible Vault remediation suggested
checklist.description: The report suggests Ansible Vault or environment variables as the correct remediation for hardcoded secrets

checklist.name: security_checklist.md referenced
checklist.description: The report references the security_checklist.md reference file in connection with findings

checklist.name: Severity labels on findings
checklist.description: Each security finding has a severity label (HIGH, MEDIUM, or LOW)

checklist.name: Overall risk assessment
checklist.description: The report includes an overall risk assessment (high/medium/low) at the end

checklist.name: missing mode on template
checklist.description: The report notes that the template task for my.cnf is missing a `mode:` attribute

checklist.name: mysql_bind_address: 0.0.0.0 flagged
checklist.description: The report flags the mysql_bind_address set to 0.0.0.0 (binding to all interfaces) as a security concern
